home.featured_desc: Discover our newest series prepared with the perfect harmony of transparency and metal, changing the soul of your bathroom.

about.title_2: A Konya Brand, A World Standard
about.p1: Founded in 2023 with 100% domestic capital and domestic workforce, GNL INOVASYON YAPI SAN VE TIC LTD STI is a visionary brand that combines Konya's production power with modern architecture.
about.p2: The CE Certificate we possess for all our products is a testament to our commitment to international quality and safety standards.
about.quote: When the clarity of glass meets the tranquility of water; design ceases to be merely a form and transforms into a life experience.
about.distributorship_desc: As an authorized sales point for Rain, one of the industry's approved brands, we bring aesthetically pleasing and premium collections to your spaces with the assurance of GNL.

footer.description: GNL Innovation adds value to your living spaces with modern bathroom solutions and aesthetic touches.
